evidence: I do enjoy sci fi so found myself being caught up after the first episode of the first season.
Such fun - a Harry Potter, Indiana Jones mystery with soap opera tendencies.
I guessed (correctly) the plot while reading the reviews.
The writers rushed a threads of the story to complete the ending.
A little slow moving but still good.
Maybe the wait from week to week for a new episode dampened my enthusiasm for this show?
The cast is superb with interesting plots.
I am a fan of Christopher Lambert and of the Highlander series.
David Suchet is Poirot - and the supporting characters do not disappoint either.
The characters are people that you care about.
Saying goodbye to favorite characters is usually hard, but this wrap-up eased that pain.
This show grabs your attention - and keeps it.

summary: The user enjoys sci-fi and mystery genres, often appreciating character development and emotional engagement. They prefer slower-paced narratives with a focus on quality production, though they show some ambivalence towards complex plots and brand loyalty.
